category_sources: source_facts.description says "UTF8-friendly version of traditional vi"; official project page https://ex-vi.sourceforge.net/ describes The Traditional Vi for modern Unix systems.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is ex-vi; official project page https://ex-vi.sourceforge.net/ identifies the project as The Traditional Vi and SourceForge project path is ex-vi.
docs_sources: Official project page https://ex-vi.sourceforge.net/ has a Documentation section linking README and manual pages; official ex(1) and vi(1) manual pages are hosted at ex.html and vi.html.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official project page https://ex-vi.sourceforge.net/ links to the public CVS repository and provides CVS checkout instructions for ex-vi.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a UTF8-friendly traditional vi; official project page https://ex-vi.sourceforge.net/ says it preserves vi's terminal-oriented feature set and adds multibyte encoding support such as UTF-8.
